title: Phantom Oversized Tee
description: Crafted from 260GSM ultra-heavyweight combed cotton. Features a relaxed drop-shoulder silhouette, custom high-rib collar framing, and raw minimal finish lines optimized for daily comfort.

title: Void Pullover Hoodie
description: Double-lined architectural hood without drawstrings for a clean profile. Engineered with 400GSM cotton-poly fleece, kangaroo pockets with hidden bartack reinforcements, and cropped waist tailoring.

title: Ink Cargo Shorts
description: Heavy utility nylon construction with an adjustable tactical integrated webbing belt. Multi-pocket matrix featuring dual pleated side 3D cargo compartments and weather-resistant matte zippers.

title: Obsidian Worker Jacket
description: Heavyweight washed canvas exterior shell complete with a luxury quilted insulated lining. Features custom engraved steel hardware button closures, a sharp corduroy collar accent, and internal chest utility pouches.

title: Graphite Heavyweight Beanie
description: Double-layer four-guard knit composition engineered for structure and temperature preservation. High-density stretch memory retention yarn ensures it keeps its pristine shape over extended wear.

title: Aero Technical Pants
description: Water-repellent stretch nylon paneled structure. Ergonomic knee articulation cuts for fluid motion, adjustable bungee drawcords at the ankles, and integrated magnetic buckle fasteners.

title: Raw Ash Distressed Denim
description: 14oz raw selvedge denim cut in a modern relaxed straight taper. Features custom hand-repaired knee fray detailing, classic 5-pocket architecture, and premium branded steel rivets.

title: Cyber Core Chest Rig
description: High-tensile industrial Cordura platform with a custom mesh ventilated back support panel. Quick-release magnetic front chest clips paired with adjustable modular nylon gear strapping.

title: Asphalt Mockneck Sweatshirt
description: Elegant 380GSM organic terry cotton construction featuring a reinforced mockneck collar design. Oversized sleeves offset by a clean, close-knit elastic hem accent line.

title: Graphene Windbreaker Box
description: Ultralight ripstop shell infused with weather-proof wind blocking membrane panels. Features packable construction transitions, a waterproof front storm zipper zipper, and reflective design prints.

title: Onyx Tactical Belt Bag
description: Ballistic matte nylon composite cross-body containment system. Dual main organization bays with water-resistant seam tape seals and a reinforced adjustable quick-snap clip loop strap.

title: Static Heavyweight Socks
description: Premium combed cotton blend enhanced with a dynamic cushioned footbed arch grip structure. Breathable specialized upper mesh ventilation channels finished with high-contrast jacquard knit branding lines.

title: Krypton Technical Overshirt
description: Structured high-density technical twill shirt jacket. Dual flush-fit raw chest patch pockets, custom matte snap-fasteners, and a clean flat straight-cut hem layout.

title: Carbon Knit Balaclava
description: Tactical thermal fine-gauge ribbed face containment gear. Anatomically contoured eye-opening framing borders with seamless micro-fleece lining to ensure ultimate skin comfort profiles.

title: Soot Tailored Track Pants
description: Heavy interlock double-knit luxury track pants. Refined pinch-stitch front pleats, clean hidden zipper welt pockets, and custom-milled side stripe strip canvas panels.

title: Rust Acid-Wash Box Tee
description: Custom vintage mineral wash pattern treated 240GSM heavyweight box fit tee. Split side hem vents, extended drop shoulders, and unique individual distressing traits per garment.

title: Spectre Waterproof Shell
description: 3-layer seam-sealed laminated waterproof shell block defense. 20,000mm hydrostatic head rating, custom YKK AquaGuard fully watertight zippers, and dynamic adjustable hood visor profiles.

title: Vandal Ribbed Cardigan
description: Heavy-gauge mohair wool blend knit layout detailed with custom rough edge distressed lines. Features deep marbled resin button closure front rows and cozy dropped-slouch sleeve patterns.

title: Basalt Canvas Tote
description: 24oz ultra-rugged cotton duck canvas utility carrier. Dual heavy-webbing shoulder carry straps paired with interior computer protective sleeve pockets and steel key clip fasteners.

title: Helix Distressed Knit Crew
description: Open-knit textured panel mesh sweater detailed with custom ladders and localized fringe distressing. Built with fine organic cotton threads for comfortable warm seasonal layering layout paths.
